item.pokerelics.ancient_spoon.descriptio: Hold Right-Click in the direction of an entity to make it levitate.
item.pokerelics.vigor_candle.description: When equipped, gives a 25% chance to infuse your hits with Fire Aspect, and will give Flame to 50% of bow shots.
advancements.welcome_to_pokerelics.descr: Welcome to Pokerelics! Discover unique Relics throughout your world. Let the journey begin!

advancements.dun_dun_dun_dun_dun.descr: Repair a Relic by Shift-Right-Clicking with a Repair Material in your offhand.

advancements.pokemon_master.descr: Obtain all currently available relics in Pokerelics.

advancements.scared_the_devil_himself.de: Inflict Terror on a Warden with the Sinister Glove.
advancements.and_when_you_hit_the_jackpo: Get 10x drops from a mob with the Regal Amulet (10% chance on activation).
And when you hit the jackpot...
advancements.a_fresh_start.title: Stop Hitting Yourself
advancements.a_fresh_start.descr: "Pacify" an Iron Golem with the Hypnotic Pendant.
